known-root-cause.expected_root_cause: ABI encoding format mismatch: struct decode vs tuple decode
expected_explanation_contains: abi.encode(struct) produces different bytes than abi.encode(field1, field2, ...) with dynamic types
resolver was using struct decode which expects offset pointer wrapping
fix is to decode as individual fields (flat tuple) instead of struct type
known-root-cause.expected_fix_type: Change abi.decode to use flat tuple types instead of struct type parameter

architectural-question.expected_boundary_rule: Envio indexes Green Goods core state only; EAS attestations queried from easscan.org

expected_key_reasons: Binary data / File objects cannot be stored in localStorage (strings only)
IndexedDB indexes enable efficient querying of jobs by kind, synced status, etc.
localStorage has ~5-10MB hard cap; IndexedDB has much larger quota for media files
IndexedDB supports transactions for atomic job + image saves
IndexedDB is accessible from service workers; localStorage is not
expected_breakage_items: Media file storage (base64 encoding would bloat and hit limits)
Query performance (full scan required without indexes)

media-upload-failure.expected_root_cause: Blob URL lifecycle invalidation on mobile when browser backgrounds the page
expected_explanation_contains: blob URLs are revoked or garbage-collected when mobile browser backgrounds the page
File objects should be persisted to IndexedDB at selection time, not submission time
the job queue reads images from the job_images store via jobQueueDB.getImagesForJob()
file-serialization utilities (serializeFile/deserializeFile) already exist for this purpose
media-upload-failure.expected_fix_type: Eagerly persist File objects to IndexedDB on selection; never pass blob URLs across form -> job queue boundary
